## Summary

Describe the change and why it’s needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit title (e.g., `feat(core): ...`)
- [ ] Small, atomic PR (consider splitting if >800 LOC changed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] CI green

## Scope

Affected areas: `core`, `cli`, `mcp`, `targets`, `parser`, `registry`, `security`, `tests`, `docs`, `ci`, `release`, `init`
